description: Initial DFA route table. Defines access control patterns for the federation namespace.

routes.description: Publicly accessible endpoints. No authentication required.
Authenticated member services. Requires valid credential.
Administrative endpoints. Restricted to validator operators.
Cross-chain bridge endpoints. Only bridge-operator can relay.
Name registry operations. Managed by nameservice operator.
Price oracle feed submission. Restricted to authorized feeders.

commitment_note: SHA-256 of canonical route serialization. Placeholder until generate.sh computes actual commitment.
